_note: Synthesized representative MCP tool catalog for a Jira-style issue tracker, modeled on the public Atlassian Forge surface and the actual schemas produced by mcp-atlassian. 35 tools. This is what an agent loads BEFORE taking its first real action. Char-length and token estimate are computed by scripts/bench_token_economy.py.

tools.name: jira_search_issues
tools.description: Search for Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language). Supports pagination via `startAt` and `maxResults` parameters. Returns a paginated list of issues matching the JQL expression. Common JQL patterns: 'project = KEY AND status = Open', 'assignee = currentUser()', 'updated >= -7d'. Note that complex JQL may require specific permissions.

jql.description: JQL query string. Examples: 'project = DEMO', 'assignee = currentUser() AND status != Done'

fields.description: Fields to return. Use '*all' for all fields. Default: ['summary', 'status', 'assignee', 'priority']

maxResults.description: Max issues per page. Default 50, max 100.

tools.name: jira_get_issue
tools.description: Fetch a single Jira issue by key or ID. Returns the complete issue record including all custom fields, comments, attachments metadata, and workflow transitions available. Use `expand=renderedFields` to get HTML-rendered description and comments.

updateHistory.description: Record this view in the user's recent-issues history

tools.name: jira_create_issue
tools.description: Create a new Jira issue. Requires at minimum a project, issue type, and summary. Custom fields can be set via the `customfield_NNNNN` convention. Parent issue is required for subtasks.

description.description: ADF (Atlassian Document Format) object. Prefer simpler `summary`-only creation if possible.

customfield_10014.description: Epic Link field — parent epic key

update.description: Update operations to apply immediately after creation

tools.name: jira_update_issue
tools.description: Update fields on an existing Jira issue. Supports both set (replace value) and add/remove for multi-value fields. Returns 204 on success. Requires 'Edit Issues' permission on the issue's project.

fields.description: Fields to set, same schema as create

tools.name: jira_delete_issue
tools.description: Delete a Jira issue permanently. Subtasks are deleted by default. Cannot be undone. Requires 'Delete Issues' permission.

tools.name: jira_add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue. Body uses Atlassian Document Format (ADF) — the simpler rendering supports plain text via `{type:'doc', content:[{type:'paragraph', content:[{type:'text', text:'...'}]}]}`. Comment visibility can be restricted to a role or group.

tools.name: jira_get_comments
tools.description: List comments on a Jira issue. Paginated. Use `expand=renderedBody` for HTML-rendered comments.

tools.name: jira_update_comment
tools.description: Update an existing comment. Requires 'Edit Own Comments' or 'Edit All Comments' permission.

tools.name: jira_delete_comment
tools.description: Delete a comment from a Jira issue. Requires appropriate permissions.

tools.name: jira_list_transitions
tools.description: List the workflow transitions currently available for an issue. Only transitions the current user is authorized to perform are returned. Transitions are workflow-specific and may include validators (e.g. require a resolution to be set before closing).

transitionId.description: Filter to a specific transition ID

tools.name: jira_transition_issue
tools.description: Execute a workflow transition on an issue (e.g. move from 'Open' to 'In Progress'). The transition ID comes from `jira_list_transitions`. Some transitions require fields to be set (resolution, comment, etc.) — these go in the `fields` or `update` object.

tools.name: jira_add_attachment
tools.description: Attach a file to a Jira issue. Request must be multipart/form-data. Max file size is configured per-instance (commonly 10 MB).

tools.name: jira_list_attachments
tools.description: List attachments on a Jira issue.

tools.name: jira_delete_attachment
tools.description: Delete an attachment.

tools.name: jira_assign_issue
tools.description: Assign an issue to a user (or unassign by passing accountId=null). Requires 'Assign Issues' permission.

tools.name: jira_add_watcher
tools.description: Add a watcher to an issue.

tools.name: jira_remove_watcher
tools.description: Remove a watcher.

tools.name: jira_list_watchers
tools.description: List watchers on an issue.

tools.name: jira_add_link
tools.description: Link two issues (e.g. 'blocks', 'is blocked by', 'duplicates', 'relates to'). Link types are configured per instance.

tools.name: jira_remove_link
tools.description: Remove an issue link.

tools.name: jira_list_projects
tools.description: List visible Jira projects.

tools.name: jira_get_project
tools.description: Fetch a Jira project by ID or key.

tools.name: jira_list_components
tools.description: List components within a project.

tools.name: jira_list_versions
tools.description: List fix versions within a project.

tools.name: jira_list_sprints
tools.description: List sprints in a board. Requires the board to be a Scrum board.

tools.name: jira_move_to_sprint
tools.description: Move one or more issues into a sprint.

tools.name: jira_list_boards
tools.description: List boards the current user has access to.

tools.name: jira_list_users
tools.description: List users in the Jira instance.

tools.name: jira_get_user
tools.description: Fetch a user by accountId.

tools.name: jira_get_current_user
tools.description: Fetch the currently-authenticated user.

tools.name: jira_list_fields
tools.description: List all Jira fields including custom fields. Returns each field's ID, name, and schema. Useful when working with a Jira instance whose custom-field IDs you don't already know.

tools.name: jira_get_field_options
tools.description: List the possible values for an option-typed field (e.g. select lists, labels autocomplete).

tools.name: jira_list_workflows
tools.description: List Jira workflows.

tools.name: jira_get_workflow
tools.description: Fetch a single workflow including its statuses and transitions.

tools.name: jira_bulk_edit
tools.description: Edit multiple issues in one call. Requires 'Bulk Change' permission. Use with care — an attacker-controlled input here can fan out into arbitrary state corruption across the entire project.
